input.prompt: Create a pivot gallery of Lyra avatar concepts. Rows = aesthetic preset (editorial, cinematic, flat). Columns = pose (portrait, three-quarter, profile). Data source: face-scores.json. Enable filtering by cluster and score threshold.

notes: Pivot template — col/row matrix, groupByDim, score filtering. Anchors the pivot-gallery.html template referenced in ~/.claude/CLAUDE.md.
